query:
SELECT pjl.sceneId, pjl.status, COUNT(*) as count
FROM providerJobLogs pjl
WHERE pjl.sceneId IN (
  SELECT id FROM musicVideoScenes 
  WHERE jobId = (SELECT MAX(jobId) FROM musicVideoScenes WHERE status = 'failed')
  AND status = 'failed'
  LIMIT 10
)
GROUP BY pjl.sceneId, pjl.status
ORDER BY pjl.sceneId, pjl.status;
